wooden_shield.name: wooden shield
wooden_shield.lore: A rough disc of layered oak planks bound with iron strips at the rim. Though unglamorous, its bulk has turned aside countless blows from claws and rusted blades alike — the scratches and gouges in its face speak of many such meetings.

iron_shield.name: iron shield
iron_shield.lore: Hammered iron beaten into a slightly domed profile for strength, with a riveted central boss for grip stability. Standard issue for militia and professional guards, its proven design has remained unchanged for three centuries.

steel_shield.name: steel shield
steel_shield.lore: Polished steel stretched over a shaped core, this kite shield is tempered to resist glancing blows. The slight flex in its face absorbs slash impacts before they can transfer fully to the wielder's arm.

crystal_shield.name: crystal shield
crystal_shield.lore: Ground from a single slab of spell-resonant crystal, this shield is almost perfectly transparent. Its lattice structure disperses incoming magical energy harmlessly, making it prized by those who face arcane opponents — and beautiful enough to be displayed in noble halls when not in use.

dragonscale_shield.name: dragonscale shield
dragonscale_shield.lore: Built around overlapping scales from a fire dragon's underbelly — the toughest portion of an already near-indestructible hide. Fire washes over this shield like water off oil, and its iridescent surface shifts colors as though the dragon's spirit still lingers within.

adamantine_shield.name: adamantine shield
adamantine_shield.lore: A massive tower shield of pure adamantine, its surface an almost organic dark green-black. The metal is supernaturally dense — blunt weapons simply bounce off as though striking a mountain, though the weight demands exceptional constitution from its bearer.
